series_metadata.series_title: Records of Chargebacks to Data Processing Services
series_metadata.series_description: Electronic and manual records used to document, calculate costs and bill program units for conputer usage and data processing services. These records are also used for cost recovery, budgeting, or administrative purposes. Records Not Covered: Chargeback records subject to Federal audit requirements should be scheduled separately

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, then destroy. (See OCC-OES-05), Paper: Trash
